content: Linear officially models projects as outcome-oriented work, project milestones as lifecycle stages, issues and sub-issues as implementation units, and blocked-by relations as dependencies. Issues have human identifiers while API entities expose stable UUIDs; the GraphQL API queries and mutates them, and webhooks report project and issue changes. For delivery traceability, map the GOLC v1 milestone to one Linear project, roadmap phases to project milestones, requirements/plans to issues, tasks to sub-issues, and persist both UUID and display identifier in planning artifacts.
